highlights_headline: SkiaSharp 4.151.0 previews Skia m151 with zero-allocation improvements across text, shaping, and color APIs.
highlights_body: It syncs the bundled renderer to Chrome milestone 151 (including upstream bug fixes), adds ReadOnlySpan overloads for color parsing, eliminates per-call allocations in HarfBuzz and SKShaper paths, and extends WebAssembly support to .NET 11 via Emscripten 5.

bullets.detail: Aligns the bundled renderer with Chrome milestone 151, giving consumers the latest upstream engine while preserving SkiaSharp's managed API surface.
Three rounds of upstream Chrome/m151 fixes folded in, keeping the bundled engine current with the latest stability and correctness patches from Google.
Drops the duplicate SK_BUILD_FOR_WASM define from the Skia submodule so Emscripten builds no longer report macro redefinition noise.

bullets.lead: SKColor gains ReadOnlySpan<char> overloads and faster hex parsing
bullets.detail: Hex color parsing is rewritten for speed and new ReadOnlySpan<char> overloads are added, letting callers parse color strings without allocating a substring.

HarfBuzzSharp.Buffer.AddUtf8, HarfBuzzSharp.Tag.Parse, SKFourByteTag.Parse, and SKShaper glyph-result reads are all reworked to avoid per-call heap allocations, using pooled encoding, stack buffers, or zero-copy spans.

bullets.lead: GRContextOptions no longer requires unsafe context
bullets.detail: Removes a stray unsafe modifier from GRContextOptions that was not needed, cleaning up safe-context usage in consumer code.

bullets.lead: Native resource leak in SKImage.FromEncodedData fixed
bullets.detail: A native handle was not released when SKImage.FromEncodedData(SKData, SKRectI) was called with a region argument, causing a small leak per decoded image.

bullets.lead: WebAssembly support extended to .NET 11 via Emscripten 5
bullets.detail: Adds Emscripten 5.0.6 static libraries so SkiaSharp and HarfBuzzSharp can target .NET 11 WASM builds alongside the existing .NET 8/9/10 assets.

contributor_summaries.ramezgerges: Removed the duplicate SK_BUILD_FOR_WASM define from the Skia submodule to silence Emscripten build warnings, and added Emscripten 5.0.6 static libraries for .NET 11 WebAssembly support

preview_summaries.v4.151.0-preview.1.1: Preview 1 opened the 4.151 line with the Skia m151 engine update and the WebAssembly Skia build cleanup.
preview_summaries.v4.151.0-preview.2.1: Preview 2 added allocation-free shaping and color APIs, three rounds of upstream m151 bug fixes, Emscripten 5 support for .NET 11 WebAssembly, and fixed the SKImage native resource leak.

harfbuzz_summary: HarfBuzzSharp 14.2.1 gains allocation-free UTF-8 encoding (pooled encode) and tag parsing (stack buffer), and adds Emscripten 5.0.6 native libraries for WebAssembly on .NET 11.
